name: Pasta with Broccoli-Pine Nut Pesto
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Broccoli florets (from about 1 3/4 lb of broccoli)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the broccoli florets in a large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, about 6 minutes.
2. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the broccoli to a colander and drain.
3. Add the pasta to the same pot of water and cook until tender but still firm to bite. Drain the pasta; reserve 3/4 cup of cooking liquid.
4. Return the pasta to the same pot.
5. With the processor running, drop the pine nuts and garlic through the feed tube and chop finely. Scrape down the sides of the work bowl.
6. Add the broccoli, reserved cooking liquid, olive oil, white wine vinegar, and crushed red pepper; process until a coarse puree.
7. Pour the sauce over the pasta; toss over medium-low heat until heated through, adding more reserved cooking liquid if needed to thin the sauce.
8. Season with salt and pepper. Serve, passing cheese separately.
